# Paths excluded from the trufflehog secret scan (--exclude-paths).
# One path regex per line.
#
# test-projects/ holds E2E fixtures whose brik.yml embeds the lab's documented
# Gitea credentials as the userinfo of GitOps/evidence repo URLs. These are
# local-lab fixtures published in the README, not real secrets. Setup scripts
# and the rest of the repo are still scanned.
^test-projects/
# README documents lab service URLs (e.g. the GitLab SSH endpoint) that the scan
# reads as unverified URIs; they are published access docs, not secrets.
^README\.md$
